### Self-Review Checklist
- [ ] I pulled the latest `dev` branch before creating my feature branch
- [ ] My branch name follows the convention: `feat/task-X.Y-description`
- [ ] Zero new console warnings or errors in the browser
- [ ] No hardcoded/mock data — all data comes from APIs or seed files
- [ ] I used existing CSS classes from `src/index.css` — no custom colors, fonts, or styles
- [ ] All source data has `source_links` pointing to authoritative sources (if applicable)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or passwords committed
- [ ] Commit messages are descriptive (e.g., `feat: add firm entity schema with taxonomy tables`)
- [ ] I tested my changes locally and they work
